system.flavor: You become an immovable object, stern and powerful, like a towering citadel.
system.effect:
Stance in this stance:
• during your turn, you are immobile
• you are immune to involuntary movement
• you can be used as a cover object by adjacent allies
• gain aura 1. Any foe that voluntarily enters the aura from the outside takes 1d6 damage and is pushed 1, interrupting but not ending their movement. A foe can't trigger this effect more than once a turn.
Effect you are in crisis, also gain +1 armor in this stance and increase aura size by +1.
(Aura X persistent effect that moves with a character, affecting all other characters in range X and line of sight.)
